name: SSC Combined Graduate Level — Tier I

pattern.qualifyingCriteria: Overall cutoff per category; Tier-I qualifies candidates for Tier-II.

topics.name: Coding-Decoding & Puzzles
topics.syllabusText: Coding-decoding, matrix, blood relations, and puzzles.

topics.name: Static GK & Current Affairs
topics.syllabusText: History, geography, polity, economy, general science, and current affairs.

topics.name: Arithmetic
topics.syllabusText: Percentage, ratio, average, interest, profit/loss, time-work, time-distance.

topics.name: Algebra, Geometry & Trigonometry
topics.syllabusText: Algebra, geometry, mensuration, trigonometry, and data interpretation.

topics.name: Grammar, Vocabulary & Comprehension
topics.syllabusText: Error spotting, fill-ups, synonyms/antonyms, idioms, and reading comprehension.

meta.notes: STUB included to prove the engine is config-driven: a second exam with a DIFFERENT pattern (negative marking 0.5, 60-min single paper, +2/-0.5) loads with zero code change. Verify before any real SSC use.
